Object.Name: MQTT Server
Object.Description1: This object defines configuration parameters for an MQTT client to interact with a MQTT server.

Item.Name: Will Retain
Item.Description: The Will Retain value to declare in the MQTT CONNECT message.

Item.Name: Will Topic
Item.Description: The Will Topic to include in the MQTT CONNECT message.

Item.Name: Will Message
Item.Description: The Will Message to include in the MQTT CONNECT message.

Item.Name: Clean Session
Item.Description: The Clean Session value to declare in the MQTT CONNECT message.

Item.Name: Will QoS
Item.Description: The Will QoS value to declare in the MQTT CONNECT message.

Item.Name: Keep Alive
Item.Description: The Keep Alive value to declare in the MQTT CONNECT message.

Item.Name: Client Identifier
Item.Description: The Client Identifier identifies the MQTT client to the MQTT server. MQTT server must support ClientIds which are between 1 and 23 UTF-8 encoded bytes in length, and that contain only the characters "0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ". MQTT server may allow ClientId's that contain more than 23 encoded bytes and may support ClientId's that contain characters not included in the list.

Item.Name: User Name
Item.Description: The User Name to declare in the MQTT CONNECT message. It must be a UTF-8 encoded string. It can be used by the MQTT server for authentication and authorization.

Item.Name: Password
Item.Description: The Password value to declare in the MQTT CONNECT message.
